'''Yerka Mig''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] who became an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]], [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], and [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugated]] his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Mig resigned and fled in remorse, becoming a fugitive from both [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] and the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] and living as a fugitive on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where he frequented the planet's [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="ANH" /> Yerka Mig hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /> He joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], becoming a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]].<ref name="FF" /> Also a [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]] with high security clearance, Mig was still serving the Empire when his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugated]]<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /> in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].<ref name="Date">[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] dates the [[subjugation of Ralltiir]] to three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. According to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] begin on [[Great ReSynchronization|35:3:3]], which would place the subjugation of Ralltiir in 35:2, which equates to [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], as explained [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> Mig resigned in protest<ref name="FF" /> and fled in remorse after Ralltiir's subjugation.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /> With his high security clearance making him a fugitive from both [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] and the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]], Mig was forced to live as an outlaw on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="FF" />

[[File:MEC.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Yerka Mig (center) at the cantina]]
While on Tatooine, Mig was known to frequent [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in the planet's [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> Mig was in the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] when a former [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] named [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] named [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] entered, searching for a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to take them and the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to the planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. Mig witnessed the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Death/Legends|killing]] the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] before Solo left the cantina.<ref name="ANH" />

==Personality and traits==
Yerka Mig fled from the Empire in remorse after his homeworld's subjugation.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /> While he was living as an outlaw on Tatooine and frequenting Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina, Mig could not help but smirk at Solo quipping "sorry about the mess"<ref name="FF" /> to [[Wuher/Legends|Wuher]], the [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]]. He had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and fair skin.<ref name="ANH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yerka Mig first appeared in [[1977]]'s {{Film|IV}}, the first film of the [[original trilogy]]. Uncredited in the film,<ref name="ANH" /> he was portrayed by actor [[George Stock]], listed as one of the "bureaucrats."<ref name="Cantina Archeology Part 1">{{YouTube|video=J7ygjomkfXQ&t|text=Star Wars: A New Hope - Cantina Archeology Part 1: Behind The Scenes of the Mos Eisley Cantina - UK|channel=@CredibleNerds|name=The Credible Nerds}}</ref> Mig's scenes were filmed from [[April 12]] to [[April 22]], 1976 at [[Elstree Studios]]'s stage 6.<ref name="MakingOf">''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]''</ref> In [[1995]], [[Decipher]] first named Yerka Mig in the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game's]] ''[[Premiere Limited]]'' set.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" />
